description_long: This is a metallic helmet partially embedded in a circular patch of sand, surrounded by a black rimmed base. The helmet features a prominent vertical red stripe running from the front to the back, contrasting with its otherwise dark gray, slightly weathered surface. The front of the helmet has a T-shaped visor opening, reminiscent of Mandalorian or medieval knight designs, with subtle metallic highlights and some surface scuffing. The helmet appears robust and solid, with no visible ventilation holes or retention straps. The sand around the helmet is slightly mounded, suggesting it has been partially buried or left behind. The overall presentation gives the impression of a lost or discarded protective headgear in an urban or desert environment.
description: A dark gray metallic helmet with a red vertical stripe, partially buried in sand on a black-rimmed base. The helmet has a T-shaped visor and a weathered, robust appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red stripe and T-shaped visor, with the helmet mostly visible above the sand.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the helmet's curvature and the way it is embedded in the sand.
description_view_2: Direct front view clearly displaying the T-shaped visor and the central red stripe.
description_view_3: Rear side view showing the back of the helmet and the continuation of the red stripe, with less of the visor visible.
attribute_graphic_design: Vertical red stripe on a gray metallic surface; otherwise plain with no additional graphics.
